title: Binding attributes
description: Binding attributes link JSON values to ViewModel state via the `@{...}` syntax. Three kinds: value binding, string resolution, and event binding.

data.name: binding
data.summary: Explicit binding declaration for attributes that do not use the `@{...}` inline syntax. Rarely used directly — most binding happens via `@{...}` in attribute values.

data.name: bindingScript
data.summary: Inline JavaScript expression evaluated against the ViewModel. Use for complex derived values where `@{...}` is not expressive enough. Prefer `computed` in the spec's `stateManagement`.

data.name: binding_group
data.description: Groups related bindings for batch updates (can be array for multiple groups)
data.summary: Groups multiple bindings so they re-evaluate together. Use when several attributes on the same element should update atomically.

data.name: binding_id
data.summary: Stable identifier for a specific binding. Used by the Hot Loader to route targeted updates to the right element.

data.name: data
data.summary: Declares the ViewModel properties this Layout segment expects. Appears at the top of a Layout as `{ "data": [...] }`.

data.name: propertyName
data.summary: Specifies the ViewModel property name that this element's value binding writes to. Sometimes required for custom components whose attribute-to-property mapping isn't automatic.

data.name: shared_data
data.summary: Declares data shared with parent screens. Used in include'd partials to propagate state upward.

data.name: variables
data.summary: Alternative to `data`: compact local variable declarations. Used in cell layouts that receive item data via `@{item.*}`.
